name: world-atlas

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written coordinates when you need a tile-free choropleth of world country boundaries or a land outline, because native implementations inevitably fail at real border geometry, topologically shared boundaries, and multi-resolution simplification.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot produce trustworthy world-border geometry by default: boundary coordinates cannot be invented, nor can shared-arc topology and 110m/50m resolution consistency be maintained by hand. This package provides stable basemap data ready for topojson-client, ECharts registerMap, or d3-geo.

data_in.note: Geospatial TopoJSON Topology; objects.countries in the main countries-110m.json file is a collection of country Polygon/MultiPolygon geometries whose ids are numeric ISO 3166-1 codes. For finer borders, change the same-version path to countries-50m.json; for land outline only, use land-110m.json or land-50m.json.

when_to_use: 需要无瓦片的世界国家边界 choropleth 或陆地轮廓时用它,而非手写坐标——原生手写在真实国界几何、拓扑共享边界与多分辨率简化上必然失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到可信的世界国界几何:边界坐标不可编造,也无法徒手保持共享弧段拓扑与 110m/50m 分辨率的一致性;本包提供可直接喂给 topojson-client、ECharts registerMap 或 d3-geo 的稳定底图数据。

data_in.note: geospatial TopoJSON Topology;主文件 countries-110m.json 的 objects.countries 是国家 Polygon/MultiPolygon 集合,几何 id 为数字 ISO 3166-1 代码。需要更细边界可把同版路径换成 countries-50m.json;只要陆地轮廓则用 land-110m.json 或 land-50m.json。

artifact_note: artifact 不应依赖运行时跨域 fetch 的偶然可用性:发布前 fetch 此 pinned URL 并把 JSON 内联为常量;若宿主明确白名单 cdn.jsdelivr.net,才保留远程 fetch。
